title: EnchantedMC QoL
description: A quality of life modpack for play.enchantedmc.net
body:
![Enchanted MC](https://i.gyazo.com/cff8e98b73a1cd3aa298e9b6e44f96d6.png)
### This is a modpack constructed by _Rsms__ for **_play.enchantedmc.net_**
It has a lot of QoL features. And fixes a lot of lag issues on the server related to light updates, and enchant procs.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you got questions about any of the mods feel free to message me on discord @.rsms

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This is a modpack constructed generally for _[EMC](https://enchantedmc.net)_ players. But feel free to use it and modify it to your liking and use it on any server you like. I **DO NOT** support the use of this modpack on any public servers which do not allow these kind of mods. **USE AT YOUR OWN RISK!**

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ChatCalc](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-calc) needs some configuration before usuable for chat games. You need to type in chat ```decimal_format=#0.##``` and press tab, it will remove commas from the output. And make it work for math chat games. And to use the mod, you just type in E.g. ```100+200``` and press tab and it will output to ```300``` directly into chat.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Mods:
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Makes skins render in 3D.
- [Auto Clicker](https://modrinth.com/mod/auto-clicker) - A configurable auto clicker.
- [Better Name Visibility](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-name-visibility) - Makes nametags more visable through walls.
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - Makes F3 HUD more readable.
- [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) - Allows to play in fullscreen windowed mode.
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance.
- [BindCommands](https://modrinth.com/mod/bindcommands) - Easily bind Minecraft commands to keyboard keys.
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - Adds capes to fabric, from Optifine, LabyMod, and the MinecraftCapes Mod.
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - Adds player skin head next to chat messages.
- [Chat Calc](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-calc) - Allows to use calculator within minecraft chat.
- [Chat Notify](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatnotify) - Set up audio and visual notifications for when specified words or phrases appear in chat. **_SOME FEATURES ARE DISALLOWED ON EMC_**.
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT (custom item textures from optifine resource packs)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) - Adds a search bar to the Key-Bindings menu.
- [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) - Cosmetics and easy account switch.
- [Extreme sound muffler](https://modrinth.com/mod/extreme_sound_muffler/versions) - Client side mod that allows you to muffle sounds selectively.
- [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) - Gamma / Brightness / Night Vision mod, making it easy to see in the dark.
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Shaders.
- [KronHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/kronhud) - A HUD mod for Minecraft.
- [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips) - Give your rare items a fancier tooltip! Also adds additional tooltip configuration options.
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod.
- [No More Purple](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-more-purple) - A client-side mod allowing you to choose your enchantment glint color.
- [Perspektive](https://modrinth.com/mod/perspektive) - Freelook/Perspective mod.
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium.
- [Show Me Your Skin!](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin) - A mod to hide or customize armor rendering.
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - The fastest and most compatible rendering optimization mod for Minecraft.
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - Rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors. 
- [Tooltip Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll) - Allows you to move/scroll tooltips.
- [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes) - Makes capes more fluid when moving.
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - A zoom mod with infinite customizability.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Dependencies:
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Iceberg](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg)
- [Prism](https://modrinth.com/mod/prism-lib)
- [DarkKore](https://modrinth.com/mod/darkkore)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [MaMaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib)
 
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### EMC Resource pack
If you are having trouble getting the resource pack on EMC here is an alternative download link and manually put in the resource pack folder.

[EnchantedMC Resource pack](https://www.mediafire.com/file/s60aawgb6xvrmkc/EnchantedMC.zip/file)
